name: Stalkers - A Minecraft Horror Mod Bot
description:
TW: Deaddove themes Include but are not limited to; Murder, Stalking, Drugging, Kidnapping, Noncon, and Yandere themes.

This bot so far contains Herobrine, The knocker, The obsessed, and the man from the shadow.

More horror mod characters can and will be added upon request

There are 5 different roleplay starters, one that can be used for any character, and four others that are specific to each stalker I've added so far. I've also included a 6th message where you can create your own starter (I suck at starters).

I highly recommend using a proxy for this bot because of the high token count.
creator: P4ttyk4ke5
